name: mcp-feedback-enhanced
description: Interactive feedback collection for AI assistants with multi-session tabs (Hunter fork)

commands.title: MCP Feedback Enhanced: Open in Editor (Tab)
MCP Feedback Enhanced: Open in Bottom Panel
MCP Feedback Enhanced: Reconnect to Server
MCP Feedback Enhanced: Force Reset (Restart Server)
MCP Feedback Enhanced: Post-Deploy Reload Checklist
MCP Feedback Enhanced: Clear Today's Panel Log

mcpFeedback.retainContextWhenHidden.description: Keep webview state when the bottom panel is hidden (uses more memory).

mcpFeedback.quickReplies.description: Override quick reply button text by id (continue, looks-good, fix, pause, test-verify, finished).

scripts.vscode:prepublish: cd mcp-server && npm run build && cd .. && node scripts/generate-webview.js --prod && node scripts/validate-build.js && npm run esbuild-base -- --minify && npm run verify
scripts.compile: cd mcp-server && npm run build && cd .. && tsc -p ./ && node scripts/generate-webview.js && node scripts/validate-build.js && npm run esbuild && npm run verify && node scripts/validate-webview-runtime.js
scripts.verify: node -e "const h=require('fs').readFileSync('out/webview/panel.html','utf8');const e=require('fs').readFileSync('out/extension.js','utf8');const checks=[];if(!h.includes('{{SERVER_URL}}'))checks.push('Missing SERVER_URL placeholder');if(!h.includes('{{VERSION}}'))checks.push('Missing VERSION placeholder');if(!h.includes('connect-src ws://127.0.0.1'))checks.push('Missing CSP connect-src');if(!h.includes('hub-connect'))checks.push('Missing hub-connect in panel');if(!e.includes('attachWebview'))checks.push('Missing attachWebview');if(!e.includes('panel.html'))checks.push('Missing panel.html reference');if(!h.includes('{{ERUDA_URI}}'))checks.push('Missing ERUDA_URI placeholder');if(!h.includes('{{ERUDA_PANEL_URI}}'))checks.push('Missing ERUDA_PANEL_URI placeholder');if(!h.includes('{{PANELSTATE_SESSIONS_VIEW_URI}}'))checks.push('Missing PANELSTATE_SESSIONS_VIEW_URI placeholder');if(!h.includes('{{PANELSTATE_TRANSPORT_URI}}'))checks.push('Missing PANELSTATE_TRANSPORT_URI placeholder');if(!h.includes('{{PANELSTATE_URI}}'))checks.push('Missing PANELSTATE_URI placeholder');if(!h.includes('{{PANELCONNECTION_URI}}'))checks.push('Missing PANELCONNECTION_URI placeholder');if(!h.includes('{{PANEL_PATH_REFERENCES_URI}}'))checks.push('Missing PANEL_PATH_REFERENCES_URI placeholder');if(!h.includes('{{PANELAPP_URI}}'))checks.push('Missing PANELAPP_URI placeholder');if(!h.includes('{{PANEL_AGENT_RESUME_WATCH_URI}}'))checks.push('Missing PANEL_AGENT_RESUME_WATCH_URI placeholder');if(!require('fs').existsSync('out/webview/panelAgentResumeWatch.js'))checks.push('Missing panelAgentResumeWatch.js');if(!require('fs').existsSync('out/webview/panelStateSessionsView.js'))checks.push('Missing panelStateSessionsView.js');if(!require('fs').existsSync('out/webview/panelPathReferences.js'))checks.push('Missing panelPathReferences.js');if(!require('fs').existsSync('out/webview/panelStateTransport.js'))checks.push('Missing panelStateTransport.js');if(!require('fs').existsSync('out/webview/panelState.js'))checks.push('Missing panelState.js');if(!require('fs').existsSync('out/webview/panelConnection.js'))checks.push('Missing panelConnection.js');if(!require('fs').existsSync('out/webview/panelApp.js'))checks.push('Missing panelApp.js');if(!require('fs').existsSync('out/webview/erudaPanel.js'))checks.push('Missing erudaPanel.js');if(!require('fs').existsSync('out/webview/vendor/eruda.js'))checks.push('Missing vendor/eruda.js');if(checks.length){console.error('ERRORS:',checks.join(', '));process.exit(1)}console.log('Verify OK')"
scripts.test:fast: node --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/hooks.test.js tests/ws-server.test.js tests/panelState.test.js tests/panelState.model.test.js tests/contracts.test.js tests/scenarios.test.js
